display_name: Beyter et al. 2021 Icelandic long-read SV catalog
ingest_command: bcftools view beyter_iceland.sv.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/SVTYPE,INFO/SVLEN,INFO/AF,INFO/END' | llmap variant-ingest --source beyter_iceland_2021 --kind sv --bucket-bp 100 --output beyter.priors
notes: 3,622 Icelandic individuals, ONT long-read SVs with population AFs. Complements gnomAD SV in size range >5 kb where short-read calls are unreliable.
